name: mini-zapier
description: Microservices workflow automation platform similar to Zapier

scripts.build:all: npm run build:services && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:services: cd services/api-gateway && npm run build && cd ../auth-service && npm run build && cd ../workflow-service && npm run build && cd ../execution-service && npm run build && cd ../trigger-service && npm run build && cd ../action-service && npm run build && cd ../notification-service && npm run build
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run setup:services && npm run setup:frontend
scripts.setup:services: cd services/api-gateway && npm install && cd ../auth-service && npm install && cd ../workflow-service && npm install && cd ../execution-service && npm install && cd ../trigger-service && npm install && cd ../action-service && npm install && cd ../notification-service && npm install
